'''yataja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mks|mks]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mks|mks]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yataja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yætæjæth|yætæjæth]] || [[word:yætæjæj|yætæjæj]] || [[word:yætæjæsh|yætæjæsh]] || [[word:yætæjæ|yætæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yatatajath|yatatajath]] || [[word:yatatajaj|yatatajaj]] || [[word:yatatajash|yatatajash]] || [[word:yatataja|yatataja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yatajath|yatajath]] || [[word:yatajaj|yatajaj]] || [[word:yatajash|yatajash]] || [[word:yataja|yataja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yatafjath|yatafjath]] || [[word:yatafjaj|yatafjaj]] || [[word:yatafjash|yatafjash]] || [[word:yatafjaf|yatafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yatajatha|yatajatha]] || [[word:yatajaja|yatajaja]] || [[word:yatajasha|yatajasha]] || [[word:yatajaka|yatajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yatajath|yatajath]] || [[word:yatajaj|yatajaj]] || [[word:yatajash|yatajash]] || [[word:yataja|yataja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yatajathal|yatajathal]] || [[word:yatajajal|yatajajal]] || [[word:yatajashal|yatajashal]] || [[word:yatajakal|yatajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yatajathatha|yatajathatha]] || [[word:yatajajaja|yatajajaja]] || [[word:yatajashasha|yatajashasha]] || [[word:yatajaka|yatajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yatajathan|yatajathan]] || [[word:yatajajan|yatajajan]] || [[word:yatajashan|yatajashan]] || [[word:yatajakan|yatajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yatajathaoro|yatajathaoro]] || [[word:yatajajaoro|yatajajaoro]] || [[word:yatajashaoro|yatajashaoro]] || [[word:yatajakaoro|yatajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
